artPrompt: An evocative scene of ashen-robed faithful packed standing on a sagging wooden balcony above a candle-lit revival, faces lifted toward the looming clock tower, cold gold halos flickering through drifting ash and smoke, bone-white robes glowing against blood-dark sky, an ongoing fervent vigil swelling as midnight nears, tender and grave, rendered as soft pastel impressionism — hazy diffuse light, visible chalky texture, gentle gradients, dreamy muted color.
name: The Believers' Balcony
text:
Creatures you control get +0/+1 for each doom counter on the Doomsday Clock divided by four, rounded down. The faithful stand taller as the end nears.
Whenever the Doomsday Clock reaches midnight (twelve or more doom counters), creatures you control gain indestructible until end of turn. The rapture spares the congregation first.
flavorText: Standing room only. There is no sitting during the apocalypse; it would seem rude.
